claims.summary: Unmeasured qualitative defaults can be mistaken for missing data or completed analysis.
claims.disposition: Verified that production witnesses no longer emit the qualitative defaults or analysis-state schema.

claims.summary: A capture-gap receipt should identify the prior successful witness when available.
claims.disposition: Verified previous_witness_id tracking in the bounded asynchronous writer and its explicit unknown relation when unavailable.

claims.summary: Canonical body integrity should verify both byte count and SHA-256 against the exact body.
claims.disposition: Verified the private integrity method and truncation regression.

claims.summary: Interpretation provenance should retain artifact, source, and model-call lineage.
claims.disposition: Verified exact source and model call parent IDs in the current interpretation ProvenanceRefV1 construction and tests.
